title: heliciopsis henryi
intro: Heliciopsis henryi, also known as the Henry's heliciopsis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Heliciopsis henryi include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations of Heliciopsis henryi include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
